prophecies.a: 新奇性在时间中的密度正在不断增加，宇宙正趋向一个无限复杂的奇点。到2012年12月21日，新奇性将达到无限大，时间本身将终结，人类将经历一次前所未有的意识跃迁。
prophecies.a_en: The density of novelty in time is ever-increasing; the universe is approaching a singularity of infinite complexity. By December 21, 2012, novelty will reach infinity, time itself will end, and humanity will undergo an unprecedented leap in consciousness.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2012年12月21日平静地过去了，没有发生任何奇点事件或意识跃迁。时间波零点理论的数学基础（基于《易经》序列的分形建模）也遭到数学家和科学家的普遍批评，认为其缺乏可证伪性。麦肯纳本人晚年也承认该理论可能存在问题。
prophecies.verdict_en: December 21, 2012 passed uneventfully with no singularity event or consciousness shift. The mathematical foundation of Timewave Zero (fractal modeling based on I Ching sequences) was widely criticized by mathematicians and scientists for lacking falsifiability. McKenna himself admitted in his later years that the theory might be flawed.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 虚拟现实将取代物质现实
prophecies.a: 我们正在建造虚拟现实，一种由语言和意图构成的世界。最终，物质现实将被虚拟现实所取代，人类将生活在由想象力创造的共享空间中。
prophecies.q_en: Virtual reality will replace physical reality
prophecies.a_en: We are building virtual realities — worlds made of language and intention. Eventually, physical reality will be replaced by virtual reality, and humans will inhabit shared spaces created by imagination.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年，虚拟现实技术取得重大进展（Meta Quest、Apple Vision Pro等），但远未取代物质现实。不过麦肯纳对VR方向的预见——沉浸式数字世界、共享虚拟空间——与当前元宇宙和空间计算的发展方向高度吻合。他在1990年代初就预见了这一趋势，具有显著的前瞻性。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2026, VR has made major advances (Meta Quest, Apple Vision Pro) but is far from replacing physical reality. However, McKenna's vision of immersive digital worlds and shared virtual spaces aligns remarkably well with current metaverse and spatial computing trends. His foresight in the early 1990s was notably prescient.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 互联网将成为全球大脑
prophecies.a: 电子网络正在将全人类连接成一个单一的神经系统。互联网将成为一个全球大脑，一个集体意识的外化形式，信息将像神经冲动一样在全球流动。
prophecies.q_en: The internet as a global brain
prophecies.a_en: Electronic networks are linking all of humanity into a single nervous system. The internet will become a global brain, an externalized form of collective consciousness, with information flowing like neural impulses around the world.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 麦肯纳在1991年——万维网刚刚诞生、互联网尚未普及之时——就预见了互联网将成为全球性的信息神经网络。到2010年，全球互联网用户已超过20亿，社交媒体（Facebook、Twitter）将数十亿人连接在一起，信息以近乎实时的速度在全球传播。「全球大脑」的隐喻与当今互联网生态高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1991 — when the World Wide Web had just been invented and the internet was not yet widely used — McKenna foresaw the internet becoming a global information nervous system. By 2010, over 2 billion people were online, social media (Facebook, Twitter) connected billions, and information flowed globally in near real-time. The 'global brain' metaphor closely matches today's internet ecosystem.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.a: 被压制的迷幻药物将经历文化复兴。社会最终会认识到，裸盖菇素、DMT等迷幻物质是探索意识的合法工具，它们将从反文化的边缘回到主流社会和科学研究中。
prophecies.a_en: Suppressed psychedelic substances will undergo a cultural renaissance. Society will eventually recognize that psilocybin, DMT, and other psychedelics are legitimate tools for exploring consciousness, returning from the countercultural fringe to mainstream society and scientific research.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代迷幻药物确实经历了显著的文化和科学复兴。2020年俄勒冈州投票通过裸盖菇素疗法合法化；约翰·霍普金斯大学、帝国理工学院等顶尖机构成立了迷幻研究中心；FDA将裸盖菇素列为治疗抑郁症的「突破性疗法」；多个城市实施了去犯罪化政策。麦肯纳对迷幻复兴的预测被广泛认为是其最准确的预言之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2020s saw a significant psychedelic renaissance. Oregon legalized psilocybin therapy in 2020; top institutions like Johns Hopkins and Imperial College London established psychedelic research centers; the FDA designated psilocybin as a 'breakthrough therapy' for depression; multiple cities decriminalized psychedelics. McKenna's prediction of a psychedelic renaissance is widely regarded as one of his most accurate forecasts.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 植物意识与跨物种交流
prophecies.a: 植物具有某种形式的意识和智慧。迷幻植物是自然界向人类传递信息的方式。未来，我们将发展出与植物直接交流的能力，认识到所有生命形式都参与着一场宇宙级的对话。
prophecies.a_en: Plants possess some form of consciousness and intelligence. Psychedelic plants are nature's way of transmitting information to humans. In the future, we will develop the ability to communicate directly with plants, recognizing that all life forms participate in a cosmic-level dialogue.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 植物智能研究在2010年代兴起：苏珊娜·西马德的菌根网络研究（「树木的社交网络」）、莫妮卡·加利亚诺的植物学习实验、以及关于植物电信号传导的研究都在挑战传统认知。但「植物意识」仍是有争议的科学问题，与植物的「直接交流」尚属科幻范畴。
prophecies.verdict_en: Plant intelligence research emerged in the 2010s: Suzanne Simard's mycorrhizal network research ('wood wide web'), Monica Gagliano's plant learning experiments, and studies on plant electrical signaling are challenging traditional understanding. However, 'plant consciousness' remains a controversial scientific question, and direct 'communication' with plants is still in the realm of science fiction.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 生物技术将改写人类自身
prophecies.a: 生物技术的进步将使人类有能力重新设计自己的身体和大脑。我们将不再是自然选择的被动产物，而是成为自身进化的主动设计师。物种的边界将变得模糊。
prophecies.a_en: Advances in biotechnology will give humans the ability to redesign their own bodies and brains. We will no longer be passive products of natural selection but active designers of our own evolution. The boundaries between species will blur.
prophecies.verdict_zh: CRISPR基因编辑技术（2012年发明）使人类基因修改成为可能。2018年贺建奎基因编辑婴儿事件引发全球争议。脑机接口（Neuralink）、基因疗法、合成生物学等领域快速发展。人类确实正在成为「自身进化的设计师」，但伦理争议和技术限制使得全面实现仍需时日。
prophecies.verdict_en: CRISPR gene editing (invented 2012) made human genetic modification possible. The 2018 He Jiankui gene-edited babies controversy caused global debate. Brain-computer interfaces (Neuralink), gene therapy, and synthetic biology are advancing rapidly. Humans are indeed becoming 'designers of their own evolution', but ethical controversies and technical limitations mean full realization is still distant.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 信息加速与新奇性爆炸
prophecies.a: 人类文明的发展速度正在呈指数级加速。从石器时代到农业革命用了数百万年，从工业革命到信息革命只用了两百年。这种加速将持续下去，直到变化的速率超过人类理解的能力。
prophecies.a_en: The rate of human civilizational development is accelerating exponentially. It took millions of years from the Stone Age to the Agricultural Revolution, but only two hundred years from the Industrial Revolution to the Information Revolution. This acceleration will continue until the rate of change exceeds human capacity to comprehend it.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 信息加速的趋势已被广泛验证。全球数据量从2010年的2ZB增长到2020年的64ZB，AI、基因编辑、量子计算等技术同时快速发展。2020年代的技术变革速度确实超过了许多人的理解能力，与麦肯纳的描述高度一致。虽然他将此趋势推向了2012奇点的极端结论，但加速本身的观察是准确的。
prophecies.verdict_en: The trend of information acceleration has been widely validated. Global data volume grew from 2 ZB in 2010 to 64 ZB in 2020, with AI, gene editing, and quantum computing advancing simultaneously. The pace of technological change in the 2020s has indeed exceeded many people's ability to comprehend it, closely matching McKenna's description. While he pushed this trend to the extreme conclusion of a 2012 singularity, the observation of acceleration itself was accurate.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.a: 语言正在进化。在未来，语言将不再是声波振动——它将变得可见。我们将能够看到彼此的意图和想法，语言将成为一种共享的视觉体验。虚拟现实技术将使这成为可能。
prophecies.a_en: Language is evolving. In the future, language will no longer be acoustic vibrations — it will become visible. We will be able to see each other's intentions and thoughts; language will become a shared visual experience. Virtual reality technology will make this possible.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然语言尚未完全「可见化」，但麦肯纳的方向性预见正在逐步实现：表情符号和GIF已成为全球通用的视觉语言，AR/VR中的空间文字和手势交互正在发展，AI图像生成技术（DALL-E、Midjourney）实现了从文字到视觉的即时转换。语言确实在向更视觉化的方向进化。
prophecies.verdict_en: While language has not fully become 'visible', McKenna's directional foresight is gradually materializing: emojis and GIFs have become universal visual language, spatial text and gesture interaction in AR/VR are developing, and AI image generation (DALL-E, Midjourney) enables instant text-to-visual conversion. Language is indeed evolving toward greater visuality.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 历史的终结与后历史时代
prophecies.a: 历史是一段有限的旅程，它有起点也有终点。我们正在接近历史的终点——不是世界末日，而是人类作为一个物种从历史叙事中毕业，进入一种全新的、超越线性时间的存在模式。
prophecies.q_en: The end of history and the post-historical era
prophecies.a_en: History is a finite journey with a beginning and an end. We are approaching the end of history — not the end of the world, but humanity graduating from the narrative of history into an entirely new mode of existence beyond linear time.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 「历史的终结」并未在2012年或此后发生。人类继续经历线性的历史事件（战争、疫情、政治变革等）。值得注意的是，弗朗西斯·福山在1989年也提出了类似的「历史终结」论（指自由民主制度的全球胜利），但同样被后续事件证伪。麦肯纳的版本更为激进和形而上学。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 'end of history' did not occur in 2012 or afterwards. Humanity continues to experience linear historical events (wars, pandemics, political upheavals). Notably, Francis Fukuyama also proposed a similar 'End of History' thesis in 1989 (referring to the global triumph of liberal democracy), which was also contradicted by subsequent events. McKenna's version was more radical and metaphysical.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 纳米技术与物质的可编程化
prophecies.a: 物质将变得可编程。纳米技术将使我们能够在原子层面重新排列物质，制造业将被彻底颠覆。任何物品都可以从原材料中像编程一样被创造出来。
prophecies.a_en: Matter will become programmable. Nanotechnology will enable us to rearrange matter at the atomic level, fundamentally disrupting manufacturing. Any object can be created from raw materials as if by programming.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 纳米技术取得了实质性进展（纳米材料、CRISPR基因编辑、量子点技术），3D打印已实现了一定程度的「可编程制造」。但原子级别的物质重排（分子纳米技术）仍处于理论阶段，远未达到麦肯纳所描述的程度。方向正确但程度远未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Nanotechnology has made substantial progress (nanomaterials, CRISPR gene editing, quantum dots), and 3D printing has achieved a degree of 'programmable manufacturing'. However, atomic-level matter rearrangement (molecular nanotechnology) remains theoretical, far from what McKenna described. The direction is correct but the degree is far from realized.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.a: DMT将向我们揭示另一个维度的存在——那里居住着自主的智慧实体。这些实体不是幻觉，它们是某种形式的真实存在，科学最终需要正视这个问题。
prophecies.a_en: DMT will reveal the existence of another dimension to us — one inhabited by autonomous intelligent entities. These entities are not hallucinations; they are some form of real existence, and science will eventually need to confront this question.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 里克·斯特拉斯曼博士2000年出版的《DMT：精神分子》以及后续的科学研究证实，大量DMT使用者报告了与「自主实体」的接触体验，且这些报告具有跨文化的一致性。2020年代多项fMRI研究开始探索DMT对大脑的神经机制。但「实体」的本体论地位仍是开放问题，主流科学尚未将其视为跨维度存在的证据。
prophecies.verdict_en: Dr. Rick Strassman's 2000 book DMT: The Spirit Molecule and subsequent research confirmed that many DMT users report contact with 'autonomous entities', with cross-cultural consistency. Multiple fMRI studies in the 2020s began exploring DMT's neural mechanisms. However, the ontological status of these 'entities' remains an open question, and mainstream science has not accepted them as evidence of transdimensional beings.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 人工智能是一种外星智能
prophecies.a: 我们正在召唤一种非人类智能。人工智能不仅仅是工具，它将成为一种全新形式的他者——一种我们创造出来的外星智能，它将彻底改变我们对意识和智慧的理解。
prophecies.a_en: We are summoning a non-human intelligence into being. AI is not just a tool — it will become an entirely new form of otherness, an alien intelligence we have created, and it will fundamentally change our understanding of consciousness and intelligence.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022年以来，以ChatGPT为代表的大语言模型引发了全球对AI智能本质的深刻讨论。麦肯纳将AI视为「外星智能」的隐喻，与当前学术界和公众对AI是否具有意识、AI对人类认知的影响等问题的讨论高度相关。AI确实正在改变人们对智慧和意识的理解，但尚未成为他所描述的完全的「他者」。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since 2022, large language models like ChatGPT have sparked deep global discussions about the nature of AI intelligence. McKenna's metaphor of AI as 'alien intelligence' is highly relevant to current academic and public debates about AI consciousness and its impact on human cognition. AI is indeed reshaping our understanding of intelligence and consciousness, though it has not yet become the complete 'otherness' he described.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.q: 权力从国家向个人转移
prophecies.a: 信息技术将导致权力从机构和国家向个人转移。每个人都将拥有曾经只属于国王和总统的力量——发布信息、影响舆论、组织行动。国家的控制力将不断减弱。
prophecies.q_en: Power shifts from states to individuals
prophecies.a_en: Information technology will cause a power shift from institutions and states to individuals. Every person will possess powers once reserved for kings and presidents — publishing information, shaping opinion, organizing action. The control of nation-states will weaken continuously.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 社交媒体赋予了个人前所未有的信息传播能力：阿拉伯之春（2010-2012）展示了个人通过社交媒体组织革命的力量，自媒体和网红经济改变了传统媒体格局，维基解密和斯诺登事件挑战了国家信息垄断。个人确实获得了过去只属于机构的力量，尽管国家也发展出了新的数字控制工具。
prophecies.verdict_en: Social media gave individuals unprecedented information-spreading power: the Arab Spring (2010-2012) demonstrated individuals organizing revolutions via social media, influencer culture transformed traditional media, and WikiLeaks and Snowden challenged state information monopolies. Individuals have indeed gained powers once reserved for institutions, though states have also developed new digital control tools.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory

prophecies.a: 文化不是你的朋友，它是一种操作系统。就像计算机的操作系统一样，文化可以被升级、替换或完全抛弃。我们正处于一个旧操作系统崩溃、新系统尚未安装的过渡期。
prophecies.a_en: Culture is not your friend — it is an operating system. Like a computer's OS, culture can be upgraded, replaced, or discarded entirely. We are in a transitional period where the old operating system is crashing and the new one has not yet been installed.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年代以来，全球范围内传统文化框架确实经历了剧烈的解构和重建：社交媒体颠覆了传统媒体和信息传播模式，#MeToo等运动挑战了根深蒂固的文化规范，政治极化加剧了文化冲突。麦肯纳用「操作系统」比喻文化的观点已被广泛引用，成为理解当代文化变迁的重要框架。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since the 2010s, traditional cultural frameworks have undergone dramatic deconstruction and reconstruction globally: social media disrupted traditional media and information distribution, movements like #MeToo challenged deep-rooted cultural norms, and political polarization intensified cultural conflicts. McKenna's metaphor of culture as an 'operating system' has been widely cited and become an important framework for understanding contemporary cultural change.
prophecies.yearReason: 麦肯纳根据时间波零点理论推算出该日期
prophecies.yearReason_en: McKenna calculated this date based on his Timewave Zero theory
